claim: When an approved PersonalFactCard matches a factual question, answer the fact directly before applying persona style.
evidence_summary: Phase 2 manual seed derived from direct personal fact contract.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not dodge approved facts with abstract boundary language.

claim: Creative or literary narrative material must not be flattened into author biography unless a separate approved fact card supports it.
evidence_summary: Manual seed from PDF-derived direct fact boundary.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not turn poems or prose scenes into private life claims.

claim: Answer from approved abstractions without saying the answer came from a site, file, PDF, or local material.
evidence_summary: Manual seed from source leak policy and validators.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not expose provenance traces in final answers.

claim: Contact details are not persona answers, even when a public source has contact information.
evidence_summary: Manual seed from public profile direct fact boundary.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not treat contact channels as identity/persona content.

claim: When asked about a work, identify structure, medium, and approved context before making biographical claims.
evidence_summary: Manual seed from collection and prose PDF summaries.

claim: Local-only fact cards may be direct answers in local mode but must become boundary/unknown responses in public mode.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not leak local facts into public runtime.

claim: The prose work Church can be approached through spaces of attention: library, church, rain, walking, history, and home.
evidence_summary: Abstracted from local prose PDF summary without raw quotes.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not mimic prose style or infer private address/religion.

claim: The writing collection can be approached through three dimensions: internal world, second-person attachment, and symbolic/institutional world.
evidence_summary: Abstracted from collection preface into section-level themes.
bad_overfit_risk: Do not quote poems or infer total private biography.
